title: EndpointType not re-exported from crate root
description: lib.rs re-exports ChatStreamDataType, PushUrgency, QuotaScope as commonly-used enum types, but EndpointType is absent. Users who match on Endpoint.endpoint_type or MessageAction.action_type (both public fields of public structs) must use the qualified path jmap_chat::types::EndpointType. Every other type needed to work with public struct fields (Id, UTCDate, BodyType, ContactPresence, etc.) is either re-exported or reachable from a re-exported module. The inconsistency will generate user questions and workaround imports. Maintenance consequence: support burden and downstream breakage when users pin to types:: path assuming stability.
